Disclaimer: The information on this website is for general informational purposes only and SHOULD NOT be relied upon as a substitute for sound professional medical advice, evaluation or care from your physician or other qualified health care provider.

Please note that this website is not an official website of [Atrium Wake Forest Baptist Health](https://www.wakehealth.edu/) or [Wake Forest University School of Medicine](https://school.wakehealth.edu/). This site was created to inform others about the research activities and work conducted in the Section on Infectious Diseases as part of our wider social media presence.

This website includes information about active and ongoing research projects. Research findings presented here may be preliminary, subject to change, and have not necessarily undergone peer review or been published in scientific journals. Information may be updated as research progresses and new findings emerge.
